genome_readiness_assessment.question: Can this ledger later serve as an executable organism genome?
genome_readiness_assessment.answer: YES — this manifest is drafted in the ANATOMY (#53) schema lineage; the addendum's eight genome fields are declared below and graded INVENTORY_ONLY this wave. Wave 2+ fills them per organ.
genome_readiness_assessment.lifecycle_inventory: OBSERVE→HOLD EVIDENCE→TRACE→PROPOSE→AUTHORIZE→REHEARSE/APPLY IN ISOLATION→VERIFY→COMMIT OR ROLLBACK→RECEIPT — present today as: door receipts (OBSERVE/EVIDENCE), AURA trace (TRACE), proposal+Fu (PROPOSE), kernel decide() (AUTHORIZE), disposable worktree (REHEARSE/ISOLATION), gate tests (VERIFY), candidate branch (COMMIT), receipts chain (RECEIPT). Rollback policy = declared gap.

wave2_merge_order: 1. AUMLOK ceremony/custody/onboarding port (P0 — restores the owner's full approve/bind flow; donor files named by Sam 3)
2. Signed erase attestation + erasure receipts + PQC chain heads (P0 — closes the attestation gaps Sam 2 named)
3. Donor memory categories: carry rows via migration bridge, then per-category behaviors (P1)
4. Glyph-field geometry wiring into seed (P1 — engine already present)
5. Live Fu transport behind runner boundary (P1 — advisory-only, key-gated, spend-capped)
6. Supervisor/gateway from donor #71/#26 + CONVEX_CANONICAL_BRAIN_SPEC (after core; one external gateway)
7. Spatial organ set per owner exclusion rulings (Wave 4 proper)
owner_decisions_required: Ratify or overturn each SUPERSEDED_WITH_COMPARATIVE_PROOF (esp. authority-outside-Convex and staleness fail-closed)
Rule EXCLUDED_BY_PETER per product organ family in the 1069 MISSING files (agora/forge/wolf/etc.) — until ruled, they stay MISSING and blocking
Confirm P0 order above; confirm multi-node families stay parked
Ratify the genome fields as the Wave 2+ anatomy schema (merges #53 with the addendum)
